trial_type.Description: Category of the trial presented to the participant.

Levels.FIXCROSS: Fixation cross display; no stimuli were presented and the participant remained passive.
Levels.RESPONSE: Event marking the participant’s behavioral response, during which they indicated the perceived color or meaning depending on task instructions.
Levels.ITI: Inter-trial interval during which a blank screen was presented between the participant’s response and the onset of the fixation cross announcing the next trial.
Levels.INK: Participant was instructed to report the color of the displayed word or character string, regardless of its semantic content.
Levels.COLOR_NAME: Participant was instructed to report the meaning (semantic content) of the displayed word, regardless of its color.
Levels.FEEDBACK: Feedback presented after the participant’s response, indicating correctness; these trials were shown only during the training phase.
Levels.T_INK: Training trial for the INK condition, in which the participant reported the color of the displayed word or character string.
Levels.T_COLOR_NAME: Training trial for the COLOR_NAME condition, in which the participant reported the semantic meaning of the displayed word.

trial_number.Description: Index of the trial within the task (starting at 1).

stroop_condition.Description: Condition type in the Stroop task describing the relationship between the color and semantic content of the stimulus.

Levels.Congruent: The color of the word matched its semantic meaning.
Levels.Incongruent: The color of the word conflicted with its semantic meaning.
Levels.Neutral: Control condition where the word is printed in black ink (INK condition) or there is no color name but a series of Xs (color name condition)

stim_text(PL).Description: Text content of the stimulus presented, in the participant’s native language (Polish).

stim_text(eng).Description: Text content of the stimulus presented, translated into English.

stim_color(PL).Description: Name of the color in which the stimulus text was displayed, in the participant’s native language (Polish).

stim_color(eng).Description: Name of the color in which the stimulus text was displayed, translated into English..

response_type.Description: Classification of the participant’s behavioral response.

Levels.incorrect: Participant’s response did not match the correct color or semantic meaning according to task instructions.
Levels.hit: Participant responded correctly according to task instructions.

response_color.Description: Color indicated by the participant as their response.
